amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Annex III — paragraph 1 — point 6 — point a
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Annex III — paragraph 1 — point 6 — point a

## Text proposed by the Commission

(a) AI systems intended to be used by law enforcement authorities for making individual risk assessments of natural persons in order to assess the risk of a natural person for offending or reoffending or the risk for potential victims of criminal offences;

(a)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

deleted

AI systems intended to be used by law enforcement authorities for making individual risk assessments of natural persons in order to assess the risk of a natural person for offending or reoffending or the risk for potential victims of criminal offences;

(a)
